resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-shop-search
resourceTemplates.title: Search TikTok Shop
resourceTemplates.description: Searches TikTok Shop products by query. Use `page` to retrieve specific pages and optionally filter by `region`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-shop-products
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok Shop products
resourceTemplates.description: Returns products from a TikTok Shop using `shop_id`, with pagination via `cursor` and optional regional filtering.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-shop-product-details
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok Shop product details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed information for a TikTok Shop product by `product_id`, including stock and related promotional content when available.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-shop-product-reviews
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok Shop product reviews
resourceTemplates.description: Returns reviews for a TikTok Shop product. Use `cursor` to paginate through review pages and optionally pass `region`.
